title: Hear the cry—the call for overcomers!

segments.text: Hear the cry—the call for overcomers!
Who will serve to be God’s instrument
As the means to consummate the present,
Ush’ring in the glorious King’s descent?
With the marching throng leave all else behind;
Let not a price be left unpaid.
Answer gladly, without reservation;
Great resolutions now be made!
Who shall go, with King’s commission laden?
Only men trained for the battlefield.
Thus, dear saints, we need to be perfected!
Sendable—a worthy trait to wield.
Trained in life, in truth, and in character,
In service, and God’s ordained way.
God needs such enlisted in His army
To meet His urgent need today.
In the splendor of our consecration
Thy willing host, Lord, Behold!
Under Thy perfecting hands committed,
Foll’wing the vision we hold!
Let the age today be consummated,
The kingdom brought, and Christ extolled!
In Thy life we’d grow, e’ermore advancing,
Under Thy dispensing daily be.
Thorough dealings work Thou in our being,
Deepening our roots and love for Thee.
Make us hunger so on Thy word to feed,
That high peak truth be stored in us.
Lab’ring on the riches of Thy speaking,
We’d share the good deposit thus.
Vessels with humanity uplifted;
Tempered, balanced, to Thy mold conformed.
Live reality which is in Jesus
To express the Christ within us formed.
Then the self deny, in the Body serve,
Invest our talents faithfully.
In the morn revived, o’ercoming daily;
Outflow of life our work shall be.
In the splendor of our consecration
Thy willing host, Lord, Behold!
Under Thy perfecting hands committed,
Foll’wing the vision we hold!
Let the age today be consummated,
The kingdom brought, and Christ extolled!
To the world proclaim the kingdom’s gospel,
Nourish saints in homes with warm embrace,
All perfect in groups by mutual teaching,
And in meetings speak the words of grace.
The perfected saints, hence, the Body build;
The Bride at last shall be prepared.
Lo! The beachhead of the coming Kingdom;
The present age’s end declared!
How we yearn to see the King in glory!
In our lifetime may His coming be.
In the kingdom manifested fully,
Reign as kings with Christ—our hope we’ll see!
Make us ready, Lord—in Thy presence, meet—
On spices’ mountain Thee to face.
Then forever in the Holy City,
Loud and resoundingly we’ll praise!
In the splendor of our consecration
Thy willing host, Lord, Behold!
Under Thy perfecting hands committed,
Foll’wing the vision we hold!
Let the age today be consummated,
The kingdom brought, and Christ extolled!
